//: Stage 7.3c — Ty's deployment parameter template (FILL IN BEFORE DEPLOYING)
Replace every <FILL_ME: ...> token with the real value.
DO NOT commit any file containing real subscription IDs, passwords, or tokens.
This template is safe to commit as-is — it contains only placeholders.

location.//: FILL_ME: Azure region — e.g. westeurope, westus2, eastus
location.//2: Must match the region where you created the resource group (Phase B)

appNamePrefix.//: Prefix for all resource names — keep as wh-staging unless you need a different prefix

staffApiImage.//: FILL_ME: Full ACR image URI for the staff API container
staffApiImage.//3: Default ACR login server (based on appNamePrefix): whstagingacr.azurecr.io
staffApiImage.//4: Build the image first (Phase F) then update this value before deploy

n8nImage.//: Official n8n image — update tag if you need a specific version

postgresSku.//: Postgres SKU — Standard_B1ms is the minimum burstable tier (~€12-15/month each)

redisSku.//: Redis Basic C0 is sufficient for staging (~€15/month)

logRetentionDays.//: 30 days is sufficient and cost-effective for staging

postgresAdminUser.//: Postgres admin username — not a secret; password is passed separately at deploy time

n8nTimezone.//: FILL_ME: Timezone for n8n — confirm with Ty/Ale. Default: Europe/Madrid
